direction: Monolithic slab layout. Everything is a heavy concrete block. Navigation is a vertical stack of oversized labels. Content panels are harsh-bordered rectangles with no curves. Typography is enormous display-weight headings crushed against tight body text. Color is almost absent - raw paper, black ink, one explosive red accent.

appliedPatterns: radical composition with hard geometric blocks
aggressive typographic scale with display-weight headings
monochromatic palette with single explosive accent color
dense information layout without decorative whitespace
raw geometry with thick visible borders
raw paper background without decorative images
aggressive typographic hierarchy with oversized headings
data-dense stat cards and table layouts
monospace secondary typography for data elements
radical composition with hard geometric blocks
aggressive typographic scale with display-weight headings
monochromatic palette with single explosive accent color
